'''B-5D8-GE3''' was a [[GE3-series protocol droid]] who worked for [[Vogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] as a clerk for his [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-run warehouse on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. He unwittingly allowed the warehouse to be infiltrated by [[T3-M4]], who was looking for a way to save [[Meetra Surik]].

{{Droid-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
